# Parvaz

> An Android VPN app that routes phone traffic through a user-deployed
> Google Apps Script relay using domain fronting (TLS SNI =
> www.google.com, HTTP Host = script.google.com). Monorepo with a
> Kotlin/Compose front end and a Go SOCKS5 sidecar core.

## Overview

Parvaz ships as a single APK. The Kotlin app provides the UI, `VpnService`
subclass, tun2socks glue, settings, and theme. The Go core (compiled per
Android ABI into `libparvaz.so`) runs as a sidecar process inside the app,
serves SOCKS5 on `127.0.0.1:1080`, and smuggles traffic through Google
Apps Script using domain fronting. One install, one release artifact.

## Technology Stack

- Kotlin 2.2.x + Jetpack Compose (Material3), min SDK 24, target SDK 36
- Go 1.22+ (stdlib first: crypto/tls, net/http, encoding/json, compress/gzip)
- Android VpnService API + tun2socks
- Gradle 9.3.x (Kotlin DSL) + AGP 9.1.x
- Light-theme NOTAM / declassified-briefing aesthetic
- Fonts: Redaction (display), JetBrains Mono (body), Vazirmatn (Persian)

## Architecture

- `app/` — Kotlin + Compose UI, VpnService subclass, tun2socks wrapper, sidecar launcher, settings storage (SharedPreferences + EncryptedSharedPreferences), NOTAM theme
- `core/protocol/` — JSON envelope encode/decode (single + batch), no network
- `core/fronter/` — TLS-with-custom-SNI dialer + HTTP/1.1 + h2 client
- `core/codec/` — gzip / br / zstd / identity decoders
- `core/relay/` — glue: envelope + client + codec
- `core/socks5/` — local SOCKS5 listener forwarding via `relay/`
- `core/cmd/parvazd/` — main sidecar binary, packaged as `libparvaz.so`
- `reference/` — upstream Python client, read-only study material
- `website/` — bilingual GitHub Pages (EN + FA)

## Key Files

- `CLAUDE.md` — architecture, layer rules, required skills, engineering principles
- `PLAN.md` — TDD milestone list (Phase A core, Phase B app, Phase C integration)
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` — full data path diagram and core/app boundary
- `core/go.mod` — Go module `github.com/cocodedk/parvaz/core`
- `version.txt` — semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH)
- `reference/apps_script/Code.gs` — server-side contract Parvaz must speak

## Wire Protocol

- Dial `<google_ip>:443` with TLS SNI = `www.google.com`
- POST JSON to `https://script.google.com/macros/s/<DEPLOYMENT_ID>/exec`
- Body: `{ "k", "m", "u", "h", "b", "ct", "r" }`
- Response: `{ "s", "h", "b" }` or `{ "e": "unauthorized" }`

## Links

- Repo: https://github.com/cocodedk/parvaz
- Releases: https://github.com/cocodedk/parvaz/releases/latest
- Website: https://cocodedk.github.io/parvaz/
- Upstream: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterHttpRelayVPN
- Built by: [Cocode](https://cocode.dk) · [Babak Bandpey](https://linkedin.com/in/babakbandpey)

## Legal / ToS

Google Apps Script's terms forbid this use. Deploy `Code.gs` to your own
Google account only. Personal, research, and educational use only.
